title: Nutty Tender Ethiopian Peanut Stir-fry
description: A vibrant brunch dish that combines tender peanut pieces with aromatic mint for a refreshing and nutty flavor profile suitable for pescatarian meals.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Toss in minced garlic and green peppers for another minute until slightly softened.
Sprinkle baking soda evenly over the vegetables to tenderize them further. Let sit for 2-3 minutes before stirring gently again with a spatula.
Stir in peanut sauce mix, cooking for an additional 1 minute while mixing everything together well.
Fold in mint leaves and stir until they wilt slightly, about 30 seconds more.
Remove from heat immediately to avoid overcooking the vegetables. Serve hot as a side dish or over a bed of rice.
